summary: Audience tape captures the intimate 80s venue vibe with solid low‑end detail, though some find the levels overly saturated; the show itself is high‑energy with a memorable second encore of “Satisfaction.”
review: The recording is an audience source that does a good job rendering the room’s ambience and low frequencies, but a few listeners report excessive saturation and distortion. Musically the concert is remembered as a fun, high‑energy performance – especially the second encore of “Satisfaction” that got the crowd dancing. Overall the show shines despite the mixed technical impressions.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the performance and crowd energy (70% weight) offset by divided opinions on recording quality (30% weight), resulting in an overall rating just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good low‑end response and vivid venue ambience noted, but levels are reported as too high and distorted by some listeners.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans recall a lively atmosphere with strong crowd participation; the second encore of “Satisfaction” is highlighted as an especially energetic moment.
